body_txt: Wonder Woman is the first comic book superheroine to headline a series , and she set the stage for more to do the same. Some comic writers in other companies try to come up with original characters that have little in common with her beyond their starring roles, some base theirs on well-known male heroes , but more than enough take inspiration from Wonder Woman herself. Diana's origins, powers, costume, and even her whole supporting cast are often copied to essentially make an Expy . Across various comic companies, there are many CaptainErsatzes of Wonder Woman in some form. No matter if the character in question is played straight, parodied , deconstructed , or corrupted it isn't hard to find a female superhero that takes cues from the Amazing Amazon . These characters often include the following traits: See also: Superman Substitute , Batman Parody , Spider-Man Send-Up , Captain Fishman , The Fantastic Faux , HULK MASH!-Up , and Wolverine Wannabe for more superhero expies.
